body.title: D331: Design escalation — Igor proposes, CC approves, Igor resumes
body.result: D331 live: propose/approve commands in cc_queue.py. _pe_escalate composes design proposals for HIGH inertia instead of blocking. context-load surfaces 🟠 awaiting_approval tickets. Full flow verified: propose→awaiting_approval→approve→pending with approved_plan. Arbiter deletion deferred (separate ticket). 1880 tests pass.
body.description: When Igor hits HIGH inertia or needs design approval: compose proposal (what+why), post to CC channel as awaiting_approval, park ticket, move on. CC context-load surfaces pending approvals. On approval, ticket resumes with approved plan. Replaces arbiter (old scaffolding — delete). The missing piece for Igor-as-programmer.
